name: serverest-joao
description: Test automation project for Serverest API and Frontend

scripts.report:gen: npx mochawesome-report-generator cypress/report/index.json --reportDir cypress/report --reportFilename test_report --reportTitle "Serverest Test Report"
scripts.test: npm run clean:report && (npm run cypress:run || true) && npm run report:merge && npm run report:gen
